titleStmt.title: SII 7.316: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 316. (A.R. No. 126 of 1901). ON THE ELEVENTH SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīvināyakāya namaḥ namastuṁgaśiracyuṁbica
ṁdrecāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī . jayāvyudaya śakavaruśa
1301 nyeya kaḷayukta saṁvatsarada . dvitīya jyēṣṭha su
15 śukravāradalu śrīma(ṁ)nma(ma)hārājādhirā
ja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrahariyappa Oḍeyara rā
jyābhyudeyadalu Avara nirūpadiṁ śrīma(ṁ)nmahā
pradhānaṁ boṁmarasa voḍeyaru bārakū
ra rājyava nāḷuva kāladalu mūṟukēriya
saumyedēvarige sōmōparāgapu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalu
kuḍiniraharigaḷu māḍida dha¨r(ṁ)ma prati paU¨rṇa
māseya Oṁdu dinadalu Ā saumyadēvara ga[¨rbhba]
gruhadallu Eraḍu taḷuviṁge Eṁṇe teṁgu 3 dēvara vo
ḷasuttupaUḷiya dīvigege Eṁṇe teṁgu 6 naṁdimaṁ
ṭapada sutu taḷuviṁge Eṁṇe teṁgu 6 Aṁtu Eṁṇe
teṁgu 15 nū prati paU¨rnamiyalu naḍasuva da¨r(ṁ)mma
naṁbaḷiyoḷage heggaḍeya beṭṭinalu nāraṇa ho
ḷḷana makkaḷu viṣṇuhoḷa Ātana taṁma vāsudē
va hoḷḷa Aṁtu yibbarū Ēkastarāgi tāvu ba
ddha brahmadāyada mūlada bāḷu bayalu nā
gaṁḍugadalu bittuva mū 4 mekke mū 2 makkamū 14 A
ntu bittuva mū 20 Alliya mane ṭhāU mekke mara
nikiniḍilu sahitavāgi Ā bāḷa badduharigaḷu māḍida ma
kkenāgaṁḍugadallu bhatada hāneyalli Āki mūḍe
5 . mūḍe Akkeyanu tettu bāḷuvanu Ā bāḷiṁge teṟu voṁdu
mūḍeya teṟina modalanu Ā vura Aṟuvara saṁmāṁdadiṁda
A Ura nāḷuva cavuḍpaAyanavaru dēvaruAyanavaru maṁgalū
ra cavuḍpaAyanavaru Aṁtu mūvaru yēkkastarāgi A teṟanu
sōmayyadēvarige sa¨rvamāṁnyavāgi dha reya neṟada
ru . Ā hoḷakkaḷu Ā Ākkiyanu Uḷiyade naḍasibaha
ru . naḍasade Uḷidaḍe Ā bāḷanu dēvarige vobbesidavaru .
yi dha¨rmakke Ādipālakaru mūṟukēriya halaru .
svadataṁ paradataṁ vā yō harētu vasuṁdharāṁ . śaṣṭi¨rvaru
ṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . boṁma
rasa Oḍeyara suhastade Oppa . boṁmarasara baraha
śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 7.316 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
